theory_question.content_rules: Plain text question, clear and specific, tests one learning outcome

coding_question.content_rules: Plain text problem (1-4 sentences). NO markdown headers. Include sample I/O as plain text.
coding_question.starter_code_rules: Separate CodeSnippet linked by code_id. Function signature + '# Write your code here'.
bad_format_examples: Category as LLM_APP_CODING instead of PYTHON_CODING
